Symptom_Clusters: Depressed mood; anhedonia; sleep disturbance; fatigue; cognitive impairment; appetite changes; suicidal ideation
Common_Phenotypes: Left frontal hypoactivity; rumination-dominant; anhedonic; anxious-depressive; melancholic; atypical
Severity_Levels: Mild; Moderate; Severe; Treatment-resistant (≥2 adequate trials)
Core_Assessments: PHQ-9; HAM-D; MADRS; QIDS; GAD-7 (comorbid anxiety); ISI (sleep); suicide risk screening
Contraindication_Alerts: Seizure history; implants; bipolar screen required; active suicidal ideation with plan
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS; iTBS; tDCS; CES; taVNS; VNS (implanted, TRD); Neurofeedback
Notes: Strongest evidence for rTMS/iTBS targeting L-DLPFC. tDCS literature-supported. CES emerging for primary MDD. VNS PMA-approved for TRD with ≥4 Rx failures.

Symptom_Clusters: Persistent depressive symptoms despite ≥2 adequate antidepressant trials; functional impairment; chronic course
Common_Phenotypes: Severe anhedonic; chronic course; mixed anxiety-depression; melancholic-TRD
Severity_Levels: Moderate-severe; based on number of failed treatments
Core_Assessments: PHQ-9; HAM-D; MADRS; treatment history documentation; suicide risk assessment
Contraindication_Alerts: All standard TMS contraindications; medication review for seizure threshold; ECT history review
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS; iTBS; VNS (implanted); DBS (experimental for TRD)
Notes: VNS PMA-approved specifically for TRD (≥4 Rx failures). DBS for depression remains experimental/investigational.

Symptom_Clusters: Obsessions (intrusive thoughts); compulsions (repetitive behaviors); distress; functional impairment; avoidance
Common_Phenotypes: Contamination/washing; symmetry/ordering; harm/checking; hoarding; pure obsessional
Core_Assessments: Y-BOCS; OCI-R; CGI; GAD-7 (comorbid anxiety); PHQ-9 (comorbid depression)
Contraindication_Alerts: Seizure history; implants; concurrent SSRI review; assess for comorbid tic disorder
Relevant_Modalities: Deep TMS (BrainsWay H7); rTMS (SMA/OFC); DBS (HDE — ALIC); tDCS (emerging)
Notes: BrainsWay H7-coil first De Novo for OCD (2018). DBS Reclaim for severe TRD-OCD under HDE. rTMS SMA protocols literature-supported.

Symptom_Clusters: Excessive worry; restlessness; muscle tension; sleep disturbance; fatigue; irritability; difficulty concentrating
Common_Phenotypes: High arousal/hypervigilance; somatic anxiety; cognitive worry-dominant; mixed anxiety-depression
Core_Assessments: GAD-7; HAM-A; BAI; PHQ-9 (comorbid depression); ISI (sleep)
Contraindication_Alerts: Standard neuromodulation safety screening; medication interaction review
Relevant_Modalities: CES (Alpha-Stim); TMS (emerging); tDCS (emerging); Neurofeedback (emerging); HRV biofeedback
Notes: Alpha-Stim FDA-cleared for anxiety. TMS evidence primarily from comorbid MDD/anxiety populations.

Symptom_Clusters: Inattention; hyperactivity; impulsivity; executive dysfunction; disorganization; emotional dysregulation
Common_Phenotypes: Inattention-dominant; hyperactive-impulsive-dominant; combined; executive dysfunction-dominant; sluggish cognitive tempo
Core_Assessments: ASRS (adult); Conners 4 / CAARS 2; SNAP-IV (pediatric); BRIEF-2; continuous performance tests
Contraindication_Alerts: Seizure history; medication review (stimulants); comorbidity screen (anxiety, depression, ASD)
Relevant_Modalities: Neurofeedback (NOT supported by blinded outcomes); tDCS (emerging); TMS (emerging)
Notes: CRITICAL: Neurofeedback for ADHD shows no significant effect on probably-blinded outcomes (Cortese 2024 meta-analysis, SMD=0.04). Do not present as established treatment.

Symptom_Clusters: Sleep onset difficulty; sleep maintenance difficulty; early morning awakening; daytime impairment; fatigue
Common_Phenotypes: Sleep onset difficulty; maintenance insomnia; hyperarousal; comorbid anxiety-insomnia; comorbid depression-insomnia
Core_Assessments: ISI; PSQI; ESS; Sleep diary; PHQ-9 (comorbid depression); GAD-7 (comorbid anxiety)
Contraindication_Alerts: Screen for primary sleep disorders (apnea, restless legs); psychiatric comorbidity review
Relevant_Modalities: CES (Alpha-Stim); tDCS (emerging); Neurofeedback (emerging); taVNS (emerging)
Notes: Alpha-Stim FDA-cleared for insomnia. Differentiate primary vs secondary insomnia. CBT-I remains first-line.

Symptom_Clusters: Intrusive memories; flashbacks; avoidance; negative cognition/mood; hyperarousal; dissociation
Common_Phenotypes: Hyperarousal-dominant; dissociative; comorbid depression-PTSD; complex PTSD
Core_Assessments: PCL-5; CAPS-5; PHQ-9; GAD-7; ISI (sleep); dissociation screening
Contraindication_Alerts: Active suicidal ideation; dissociative episodes during treatment; seizure risk; trauma-triggering in clinical setting
Relevant_Modalities: TMS (literature-supported); Neurofeedback (emerging-literature-supported); tDCS (emerging)
Notes: TMS meta-analyses show large effect sizes for PTSD symptoms. No FDA clearance for PTSD. Neurofeedback shows promise but blinding concerns apply.

Symptom_Clusters: Widespread pain; fatigue; cognitive difficulties; sleep disturbance; mood symptoms; tenderness
Common_Phenotypes: Central sensitization; neuropathic component; fatigue-dominant; cognitive-dominant (fibro fog)
Core_Assessments: VAS/NRS (pain); BPI; SF-MPQ-2; PHQ-9; ISI; Fibromyalgia Impact Questionnaire
Contraindication_Alerts: Medication interactions; opioid use history; psychiatric comorbidity screen
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS (M1 stimulation); tDCS (M1/DLPFC); CES (emerging)
Notes: European IFCN Level B recommendation for rTMS and tDCS in fibromyalgia. No FDA clearance for pain-specific brain stimulation.

Symptom_Clusters: Unilateral pulsating headache; nausea/vomiting; photophobia; phonophobia; aura (in some)
Common_Phenotypes: Migraine with aura; migraine without aura; chronic migraine; vestibular migraine
Core_Assessments: Headache diary; MIDAS; HIT-6; PHQ-9 (comorbid depression)
Contraindication_Alerts: Screen for medication overuse headache; cardiovascular risk assessment for triptans
Relevant_Modalities: sTMS (eNeura — FDA cleared); gammaCore nVNS (FDA cleared)
Notes: Both sTMS and gammaCore FDA-cleared for acute and preventive treatment. Home-use devices.

Symptom_Clusters: Severe unilateral periorbital pain; autonomic features (lacrimation, nasal congestion); restlessness; circadian pattern
Common_Phenotypes: Episodic cluster headache; chronic cluster headache
Core_Assessments: Headache diary; attack frequency/duration tracking; CGI
Contraindication_Alerts: Screen for secondary causes; cardiac screening for gammaCore
Relevant_Modalities: gammaCore nVNS (FDA cleared for episodic CH)
Notes: gammaCore FDA cleared for acute and preventive treatment of cluster headache. NOT established for chronic CH.

Symptom_Clusters: Recurrent seizures despite ≥2 adequate AED trials; focal or generalized seizure types; ictal/postictal symptoms
Common_Phenotypes: Partial-onset (focal); generalized; temporal lobe; frontal lobe
Core_Assessments: Seizure diary; EEG monitoring; MRI; AED level monitoring; quality of life measures
Contraindication_Alerts: Pre-surgical evaluation required; psychiatric comorbidity screen; SUDEP risk counseling
Relevant_Modalities: VNS (implanted — FDA approved); ANT-DBS (FDA approved); rTMS (experimental for epilepsy)
Notes: VNS PMA-approved since 1997. ANT-DBS approved 2018 (SANTE trial). >125,000 VNS implants worldwide.

Symptom_Clusters: Bradykinesia; rigidity; resting tremor; postural instability; gait freezing; non-motor symptoms
Common_Phenotypes: Tremor-dominant; akinetic-rigid; mixed; with cognitive impairment; young-onset
Core_Assessments: UPDRS; Hoehn-Yahr scale; MoCA (cognition); BDI/PHQ-9 (depression); quality of life measures
Contraindication_Alerts: Significant dementia (DBS contraindication); active psychiatric illness; anticoagulation for surgery
Relevant_Modalities: DBS (STN/GPi — FDA approved); rTMS (literature-supported as adjunct); MRgFUS (tremor)
Notes: DBS STN/GPi long-established standard of care for advanced PD. Adaptive DBS (BrainSense) FDA approved Feb 2025.

Symptom_Clusters: Action tremor (postural and kinetic); upper extremity predominant; head tremor; voice tremor
Common_Phenotypes: Upper extremity dominant; head tremor; voice tremor; early-onset; medication-refractory
Core_Assessments: Clinical Tremor Rating Scale; Fahn-Tolosa-Marin tremor rating scale; functional disability assessment
Contraindication_Alerts: Significant brain atrophy (for DBS/FUS); skull geometry (for FUS); cardiac status for surgery
Relevant_Modalities: DBS (VIM — FDA approved); MRgFUS thalamotomy (FDA cleared)
Notes: VIM-DBS approved since 1997. MRgFUS unilateral 2016, bilateral 2023. MRgFUS is lesional (irreversible) vs DBS (adjustable).

Symptom_Clusters: Sustained or intermittent muscle contractions; abnormal postures; twisting movements
Common_Phenotypes: Generalized; segmental; cervical (torticollis); focal; task-specific
Core_Assessments: Burke-Fahn-Marsden Dystonia Rating Scale; Toronto Western Spasmodic Torticollis Rating Scale
Contraindication_Alerts: Pre-surgical evaluation; neuroimaging; genetic testing in some cases
Relevant_Modalities: DBS (GPi/STN — FDA approved via HDE→PMA)
Notes: Medtronic DBS: HDE H020007 (2003) → PMA (2025). Primary drug-refractory dystonia.

Symptom_Clusters: Motor deficit; spasticity; aphasia; neglect; cognitive impairment; depression post-stroke
Common_Phenotypes: Upper limb motor impairment; lower limb/gait impairment; aphasia; cognitive post-stroke; post-stroke depression
Severity_Levels: Acute (<3 months); Subacute (3-6 months); Chronic (>6 months)
Core_Assessments: FMA-UE; Barthel Index; modified Rankin Scale; ARAT; NIHSS; MoCA; PHQ-9
Contraindication_Alerts: Hemorrhagic stroke (timing); seizure history post-stroke; skull defects
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS (literature-supported); tDCS (emerging); combined protocols
Notes: Best evidence for acute/subacute phase. Inhibitory contralesional or excitatory ipsilesional rTMS. tDCS in combination with rehab.

Symptom_Clusters: Phantom sound perception; distress; sleep disruption; concentration difficulty; emotional impact
Common_Phenotypes: Unilateral; bilateral; pulsatile; tonal; noise-like; hyperacusis-comorbid
Core_Assessments: THI; TFI; VAS loudness/distress; audiogram; PHQ-9 (comorbid depression); ISI (sleep impact)
Contraindication_Alerts: Rule out treatable causes (acoustic neuroma, vascular); hearing assessment
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS (emerging — short-term effects); Neurofeedback (experimental)
Notes: rTMS shows short-term benefit but limited durability at 6 months. Laterality of tinnitus affects response. Overall modest evidence.

Symptom_Clusters: Memory impairment; attention deficits; processing speed reduction; executive dysfunction; fatigue
Common_Phenotypes: Attention-dominant; memory-dominant; executive dysfunction; processing speed deficit; mixed post-concussive
Core_Assessments: MoCA; Trail Making Test; Digit Span; Stroop; BRIEF-A; PHQ-9; PCL-5 (if trauma-related)
Contraindication_Alerts: Active seizure risk post-TBI; skull defects; metallic implants from surgical repair
Relevant_Modalities: rTMS (emerging); tDCS (emerging); Neurofeedback (emerging)
Notes: Small studies suggest improvement in attention and processing speed. No RCT-level evidence specifically for TBI cognitive enhancement.

Symptom_Clusters: Social communication deficits; restricted/repetitive behaviors; sensory sensitivities; executive dysfunction
Common_Phenotypes: High-functioning verbal; minimally verbal; sensory-dominant; anxiety-comorbid; ADHD-comorbid
Severity_Levels: Level 1 (requiring support); Level 2 (substantial support); Level 3 (very substantial support)
Core_Assessments: AQ; SRS-2; BRIEF; sensory profile; comorbidity screen (anxiety, ADHD, depression)
Contraindication_Alerts: Behavioral distress during procedures; informed consent/assent; seizure comorbidity in ASD
Relevant_Modalities: TMS (experimental); tDCS (experimental); Neurofeedback (experimental)
Notes: ALL neuromodulation evidence in ASD is from small, often uncontrolled studies. No FDA clearance. No guideline support. Do not generalize to clinical practice.

Symptom_Clusters: Nicotine craving; withdrawal symptoms; habitual behavior patterns; relapse risk
Common_Phenotypes: High-craving; stress-triggered; social smoking; heavy/dependent
Core_Assessments: Fagerström Test for Nicotine Dependence; exhaled CO monitoring; craving VAS
Contraindication_Alerts: Standard TMS contraindications; psychiatric comorbidity screen
Relevant_Modalities: Deep TMS (BrainsWay H4-coil — FDA cleared)
Notes: BrainsWay first TMS device cleared for any addiction indication (2020). H4-coil targets bilateral insula/PFC.

Symptom_Clusters: Autonomic symptoms; myalgia; insomnia; anxiety; craving; GI symptoms; diaphoresis
Common_Phenotypes: Acute withdrawal phase; protracted withdrawal; comorbid pain; comorbid psychiatric
Core_Assessments: COWS (Clinical Opiate Withdrawal Scale); SOWS; VAS craving; psychiatric comorbidity screen
Contraindication_Alerts: Cardiac arrhythmias; implanted devices; active substance use risk assessment
Relevant_Modalities: taVNS (Sparrow Ascent — FDA cleared for opioid withdrawal)
Notes: Sparrow Ascent FDA-cleared for opioid withdrawal symptom relief. Only cleared taVNS device in US.
